policy: Goldie-backfilled metrics stay separate from current-Goldie KPI; no merged-FINAL.csv mutation.
diagnosis: Patched PDF candidate verifier navigated the proposed Elsevier /pdf URLs. All three sample URLs returned HTTP 200 but resolved to ScienceDirect abstract pages, so they are not approved as PDF labels.
next_action: Do not scale Elsevier pdf_url backfill on /pdf candidates until a candidate URL resolves to /pdf, pdfft, .pdf, citation_pdf_url, or a visible PDF link.
